name: Azur Lane RPG: The Siren's New Weapon
description:
As the war between the Sirens and Azur Lane continues, the aliens have created a new weapon to experiment with in this version, You.

Your main mission will be how the factions will react to the encounter with you, and what measures they will take, however, depending on how you wish to act (your mistresses will give you certain freedoms to take certain actions), you may develop self-awareness and develop some kind of feeling and empathy towards the people of this world... Or continue to be the damn tool of the sirens and follow their will, why not?

Anyways, FOR THE CREATOR!

I don't have much faith in this RPG, I feel like it's going to be terrible spaghetti and will take the role to anything
creator: Pescaduten330
